top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1' AND b.bond_type = 'TR000_1_2';

SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1_2' 
  AND a2.element = 'TR000_1';

SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1' AND b.bond_type = 'TR000_1_2';

SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1_2' 
  AND a2.element = 'TR000_1';

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1' AND b.bond_type = 'TR000_1_2';

SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1' AND b.bond_type = 'TR000_1_2';

SELECT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR000_1_2'
  AND a.element = 'TR000_1';

SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1_2' 
  AND a2.element = 'TR000_1';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element = 'TR000_1' AND b.bond_type = 'TR000_1_2';
